identity_keys.title: CTA-Pipelining: A Latency-Oriented Spatial Scaling Method for Multi-GPU Systems
Adaptive Space-efficient Collectives for Dynamic and Unstructured Sparsity on GPU Platforms
DynamiQ: Accelerating Gradient Synchronization using Compressed Multi-hop All-reduce

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Read the three 20260712 NCCL arXiv raw captures and compared title, canonical_url, unversioned arXiv identity, and content_hash against the local June 26 and July 5 nccl-arxiv-papers captures.
local_checks.wiki_search: Searched curated NCCL Arxiv Papers, NCCL, Distributed Training Infrastructure, Inference Runtime Infrastructure, AI Infra Coverage Map, coverage-map.json, loop-state.json, and ingest.md for parent-25 terms. Before this task, 2607.07862, 2607.04676, CTA-Pipelining, Adaptive Space-efficient Collectives, and Pici were absent; DynamiQ existed only as a v1 row in NCCL Arxiv Papers.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: Read ai_infra wiki/index.md and nearby NCCL, training, inference, and coverage pages. The only existing arXiv discovery page was NCCL Arxiv Papers, so this task updates that page rather than creating dedicated paper pages.

gap_reason: The run-local task-5 slice is the next non-duplicate local backlog item after task-4. It promotes only the July 12 NCCL arXiv abstract refresh and records DynamiQ v3 as a version refresh rather than a duplicate standalone new paper.
boundaries: Abstract-only arXiv captures are discovery evidence, not peer-reviewed proof or reproduced benchmark evidence.
DynamiQ v3 is a version refresh of the existing arxiv:2602.08923 identity, not a separate new paper.
No external fetch, PDF read, NCCL release-note update, GitHub issue update, accelerator catalog update, or code change is part of this task.
